report.summary: Built comprehensive Crypto Risk Management Guide 2026 covering position sizing, portfolio diversification, DeFi liquidation protection, smart contract risk assessment, and hedging strategies — targeting high-volume search queries in a timely topic gap.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DeFi outflows intensifying in March 2026 due to geopolitical uncertainty and institutional capital shifts
A trader lost ~$50M in a failed DeFi swap due to insufficient liquidity, receiving only $36K — highlighting liquidity risk
Titan Builder captured $34.5M in MEV revenue in early 2026, showing MEV extraction remains a major risk vector
Institutional DeFi adoption growing (Morpho, Maker saw 13.6% deposit increase) but also concentrating risk
AI-driven risk management agents emerging as a 2026 trend for portfolio protection
BTC recovered from $63K to $71K within weeks — volatility creating both opportunity and risk
Identified 'crypto risk management guide' as a high-value content gap on degen0x — no existing coverage despite strong search demand

sections.title: Content Created
items: Full learn guide: 'Crypto Risk Management Guide 2026: Protect Your Portfolio Like a Pro'

~3,200 words covering 10 sections: risk types, position sizing (1-3% rule), portfolio diversification, DeFi liquidation/smart contract/oracle risk, stop-losses and hedging, custody security, personal risk framework, and tools
Risk-tiered portfolio allocation framework (Core 40-50%, Growth 20-30%, Yield 10-15%, Dry Powder 10-20%, Moonshots 5-10%)
Pre-investment risk checklist with 7 actionable questions
Smart contract due diligence checklist (6 criteria)
Security best practices table with priority ratings (Critical/High/Medium)
6 FAQ items targeting 'People Also Ask' search queries
8 internal links to degen0x tools (Portfolio Tracker, Risk Analyzer, Liquidation Heatmap, PnL Calculator, etc.)
5 internal links to related learn guides (DeFi Safety, Security Masterclass, MEV Protection, etc.)
Financial disclaimer included

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: 'Crypto Risk Management Guide 2026 — Protect Your Portfolio | degen0x' (59 chars)
Meta description: 155 chars targeting 'crypto risk management', 'DeFi liquidation protection', 'position sizing'
Target keywords: crypto risk management, DeFi risk management, crypto position sizing, liquidation risk crypto, smart contract risk
OpenGraph configured with article type, publishedTime, authors
Twitter card: summary_large_image
Structured data: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions) combined via combineSchemas()
Breadcrumb component included (auto-generates BreadcrumbList schema)
13+ internal links distributed across guide for link equity
Page added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
All imports verified: StructuredData, Breadcrumb, generateArticleSchema, generateFAQSchema, combineSchemas
